title: My 1st First Bath Book Baby Toddler Bathtime Play Floating Educational Toy
features: Features: Cute colourful characters on each page.
Padded pages to encourage hand movements.
description: Product description Baby will enjoy fun bath time 'reading' with this delightful waterproof bath book featuring bright pages filled with farm animals. A floatable bath book designed to make bath time fun, easy and safe. Cute colourful characters on each page and Questions stimulating baby's counting. Suitable from Birth. Directions [ASSUMPTION] 1. Fill bath tub with appropriate amount of water. 2. Place the bath book in the water near the baby. 3. Interact with your baby by pointing out the colorful characters and asking counting questions as indicated in the book. 4. Ensure the bath book is cleaned regularly to maintain hygiene.
